sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ النَّاسَ أَقْوَى حِينَ يَعْمَلُونَ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: To znači da su ljudi jači kada rade zajedno.
sentences.translationEn: This means that people are stronger when they work together.

sentences.translation: Stanari četvrti su se okupili da očiste ulicu.
sentences.translationEn: The neighborhood residents gathered to clean the street.

sentences.arabic: أَنْجَزُوا الْعَمَلَ فِي سَاعَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَفَرِحُوا مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Završili su posao za jedan sat i zajedno se obradovali.
sentences.translationEn: They finished the work in one hour and rejoiced together.
